plays.playDescription: J.Lambo kicks 65 yards from JAC 35 to end zone, Touchback. Patriots 14th conference title game appearance, ties Dallas for 3rd all-time (Pittsburgh 16 & SF 15). Patriots 7th-straight conference title game appearance, extends NFL record. NE Belichick 12th conference championship game & 38th postseason game as a head coach, extends NFL records.

plays.playDescription: END GAME Patriots 34th postseason win, ties GB & Dallas for 2nd-most all-time (Pitt 36). Patriots 10th Super Bowl appearance, most all-time (Broncos, Cowboys & Steelers, 8). NE-12 Brady’s 8th conference championship, most all-time (Lodish, 6). Bill Belichick 8th conference championship, most by head coach in NFL history (Shula, 6). Robert Kraft's 9th conference championship, most in NFL history (Bowlen, 7).

Patriots 10th Super Bowl appearance, most all-time (Broncos, Cowboys & Steelers, 8). NE-12 Brady’s 8th conference championship, most all-time (Lodish, 6). Bill Belichick 8th conference championship, most by head coach in NFL history (Shula, 6). Robert Kraft's 9th conference championship, most in NFL history (Bowlen, 7).
